specClauses: ENGINEERING_SPEC.md § Provider quorum and conflicts: a single provider contradicting policy without quorum produces unknown with a provisional-contradiction alert; it cannot produce a canonical fail.
ENGINEERING_SPEC.md § Provider quorum and conflicts: a critical fail requires the same evidence-quorum discipline as a critical pass.
THREAT_MODEL.md § Required adversarial tests, item 29: one provider contradicting policy while the other required providers are unavailable must not create a critical fail.
